interpretation.credit_card: High separation ratio confirms global outliers. IF and Mahalanobis both work.
interpretation.network: Low ratio confirms contextual anomalies. Raw features do not separate classes globally.
interpretation.manufacturing: Low ratio. Residual feature is essential for detection.

key_insight: Global Mahalanobis distance separates credit card anomalies (ratio > 2) but fails for network and manufacturing (ratio near 1). Feature engineering (residuals, time encoding) is required for contextual detection.
